text:
locate the information you need, please contact ResDAC.
| SAS Name | Variable Name | 
|---|---|
| NPI | National Provider Identifier (NPI) for practitioner | 
| PRVDR_ACO_YEAR | Year of ACO Source Record | 
| TIN | Tax Identification Number (TIN) of ACO Participant | 
| CCN | CMS Certification Number (CCN; formerly OSCAR number) | 
| ACO_NUM | ACO Identifier | 
| NPI_NAME | Name of Provider Associated with the NPI | 
| TIN_LBN | TIN Legal Business Name | 
| ACO_NAME | ACO Name | 
| START_DATE |
